description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Add a documented GitHub Actions workflow (template under priv/spec_init/workflows/spec_review.yml.eex or similar, plus a README section) that:
- Runs `mix spec.review --output spec_review.html` on PR open/sync
- Deploys the HTML to a per-PR path on a gh-pages-style branch (e.g., /pr/${PR}/index.html)
- Posts/updates a PR comment with the link to https://<owner>.github.io/<repo>/pr/<PR>/

Auto-cleanup of stale per-PR paths is explicitly deferred (noted as follow-up in the spec). Keep the workflow snippet copy-pastable; don't require GH App or hosted infra.
title: Document GH Action workflow for CI rendering
